ddls:
CREATE TABLE "names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each name entry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the baby */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the baby */,
  "popularity_rank" INTEGER /* Popularity rank of the name */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children with that name */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "cultural_significance" TEXT /* Cultural significance of the name */,
  "name_variant" TEXT /* Variant of the name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the name was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the name was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_names_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES gender ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity entry */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the name's popularity */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the name is popular */,
  "yearly_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the name's popularity over the years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_popularity_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_origin" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin entry */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the name */,
  "origin_description" TEXT /* Description of the name's origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the name's origin */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Historical significance of the name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_origin_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the name */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "usage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of usage of the name */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the name is popular */,
  "yearly_usage" REAL /* Yearly usage of the name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_trends_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES names ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the name */,
  "liked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user liked the name */,
  "saved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user saved the name */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., liked, saved, disliked) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES names ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., parent, researcher, admin) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) */,
  "interested_in" TEXT /* Interests of the user (e.g., parenting, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the name */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the name that was shared */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the name was shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the name was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement metrics (e.g., likes, comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sharing_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES names ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data source */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
